creator: mimoriso@gmail.com
text:
I make another patch for www/mod_auth_kerb attached in this mail.
It uses autoconf feature, so it would be safer than previous patch.

Furthermore, I posted this patch to the mod_auth_kerb project on Sourforge.Net:
http://sourceforge.net/tracker/index.php?func=detail&aid=1859455&group_id=51775&atid=464524

thanks,
